guidance: ANSI JOIN으로 변환한다.
outer join 의미를 유지한다.
join predicate는 ON 절에 둔다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E, DEPT D WHERE E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO(+)
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO

guidance: table 간 연결 조건은 ON 절로 이동한다.
row filtering 조건은 WHERE 절에 남긴다.
join 조건과 filter 조건을 섞지 않는다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E, DEPT D WHERE E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO AND D.LOC = 'SEOUL'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE D.LOC = 'SEOUL'

guidance: DISTINCT를 바로 제거하지 않는다.
중복을 유발하는 join 경로를 먼저 점검한다.
필요 시 보수적인 후보만 제안한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT DISTINCT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E JOIN BONUS B ON E.EMPNO = B.EMPNO JOIN BONUS_HIST H ON B.EMPNO = H.EMPNO
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT DISTINCT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E JOIN BONUS B ON E.EMPNO = B.EMPNO JOIN BONUS_HIST H ON B.EMPNO = H.EMPNO

guidance: join predicate 누락 여부를 우선 점검한다.
의도되지 않은 CROSS JOIN이면 보수적으로 수정한다.
의미가 불명확하면 과도한 rewrite를 피한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E, DEPT D WHERE E.SAL > 1000
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO, D.DNAME FROM EMP E CROSS JOIN DEPT D WHERE E.SAL > 1000

guidance: projection과 predicate에서 실제 사용된 alias를 확인한다.
불필요한 join 제거는 보수적으로 판단한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO

guidance: pagination에는 안정적인 ORDER BY가 필요하다.
정렬 기준이 없으면 보수적으로 후보만 제안한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

guidance: 비고유 정렬키에는 tie-breaker를 추가한다.
가능하면 unique key를 보조 정렬로 사용한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, SAL FROM EMP ORDER BY SAL FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, SAL FROM EMP ORDER BY SAL, EMPNO FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

guidance: ROWNUM 기반 제한은 표준 pagination으로 정리한다.
정렬이 필요하면 ORDER BY와 함께 유지한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 ORDER BY EMPNO
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP ORDER BY EMPNO FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

guidance: 문자열 결합 스타일을 일관되게 유지한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT ENAME || '-' || JOB AS EMP_LABEL FROM EMP
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT CONCAT(ENAME, CONCAT('-', JOB)) AS EMP_LABEL FROM EMP

guidance: nullable 컬럼 결합에는 COALESCE를 고려한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT FIRST_NAME || ' ' || MIDDLE_NAME || ' ' || LAST_NAME AS FULL_NAME FROM EMP_PROFILE
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(FIRST_NAME, ''), CONCAT(' ', CONCAT(COALESCE(MIDDLE_NAME, ''), CONCAT(' ', COALESCE(LAST_NAME, ''))))) AS FULL_NAME FROM EMP_PROFILE

guidance: WHERE 절의 CONCAT 사용은 보수적으로 다룬다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE ENAME || JOB = 'SMITHCLERK'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE CONCAT(ENAME, JOB) = 'SMITHCLERK'

guidance: 비교 목적의 과도한 문자열 변환을 줄인다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE TO_CHAR(HIREDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = '20240101'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE CAST(HIREDATE AS DATE) = DATE '2024-01-01'

guidance: 함수로 감싼 predicate는 성능 관점에서 점검한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP WHERE UPPER(ENAME) = 'SMITH'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP WHERE UPPER(ENAME) = 'SMITH'

guidance: 중복 predicate는 제거한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 10 AND DEPTNO = 10
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 10

guidance: 항상 참/거짓인 predicate는 제거한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEPTNO = 10
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 10

guidance: NOT IN의 NULL 위험을 점검한다.
필요 시 NOT EXISTS 대안을 제안한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO NOT IN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM DEPT_FILTER)
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DEPT_FILTER DF WHERE DF.DEPTNO = EMP.DEPTNO)

guidance: IN-subquery는 EXISTS 또는 JOIN 전환을 검토한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT EMPNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO IN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM DEPT WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y')
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DEPT D WHERE D.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO AND D.ACTIVE_YN = 'Y')

guidance: trivial subquery는 평탄화한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP) E
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP

guidance: 과도한 nested 구조를 완화한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO IN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM DEPT WHERE LOC = 'SEOUL'))) X
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO IN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM DEPT WHERE LOC = 'SEOUL')

guidance: correlated subquery는 join이나 집계 서브쿼리 대안을 검토한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E WHERE E.SAL > (SELECT AVG(SAL) FROM EMP X WHERE X.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO)
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO FROM EMP E JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, AVG(SAL) AS AVG_SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) X ON E.DEPTNO = X.DEPTNO WHERE E.SAL > X.AVG_SAL

guidance: 재사용되지 않는 trivial CTE는 단순화 후보로 본다.
rules.example_bad_sql: WITH E1 AS (SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO FROM EMP), E2 AS (SELECT * FROM E1) SELECT * FROM E2
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, DEPTNO FROM EMP

guidance: DISTINCT와 GROUP BY의 중복 사용은 보수적으로 판단한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT DISTINCT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT DISTINCT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO

guidance: 집계와 무관한 HAVING 조건은 WHERE로 이동을 검토한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO HAVING DEPTNO = 10
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = 10 GROUP BY DEPTNO

guidance: 집계 전 join 폭증 가능성은 보수적으로 다룬다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT D.DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM DEPT D JOIN EMP E ON D.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO JOIN EMP_BONUS B ON E.EMPNO = B.EMPNO GROUP BY D.DEPTNO
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT D.DEPTNO, COUNT(*) FROM DEPT D JOIN EMP E ON D.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO JOIN EMP_BONUS B ON E.EMPNO = B.EMPNO GROUP BY D.DEPTNO

guidance: SELECT *는 가능하면 명시 컬럼으로 치환한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT * FROM EMP
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO FROM EMP

guidance: alias는 일관되게 사용한다.
projection alias를 명확히 표기한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO A, E.ENAME FROM EMP E
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT E.EMPNO AS EMPNO, E.ENAME AS ENAME FROM EMP E

guidance: 내부 subquery의 불필요한 ORDER BY는 제거한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP ORDER BY ENAME) X
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT EMPNO, ENAME FROM EMP

guidance: 중복 CAST를 제거한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT CAST(CAST(SAL AS NUMBER) AS NUMBER) AS SALARY FROM EMP
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT CAST(SAL AS NUMBER) AS SALARY FROM EMP

guidance: inline view가 단순 projection/join 용도라면 base table join으로 풀어서 view merging이 가능하게 만든다.
outer filter와 inner join predicate를 한 번에 재배치해 optimizer가 더 많은 access path를 검토하게 한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, dept_locs_v.street_address, dept_locs_v.postal_code FROM employee e, (SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name, l.street_address, l.postal_code FROM departments d, locations l WHERE d.location_id = l.location_id) dept_locs_v WHERE dept_locs_v.department_id = e.department_id AND e.last_name = 'Smith'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, l.street_address, l.postal_code FROM employee e, departments d, locations l WHERE d.location_id = l.location_id AND d.department_id = e.department_id AND e.last_name = 'Smith'

guidance: 서브쿼리 안쪽의 inline view도 단순 중첩이면 평탄화해서 최종 join graph를 단순화한다.
view merging 이후 outer predicate가 필요한 위치로 자연스럽게 내려가도록 구조를 정리한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT outer_q.first_name, outer_q.last_name, outer_q.street_address, outer_q.postal_code FROM (SELECT e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name, dept_locs_v.street_address, dept_locs_v.postal_code FROM employee e, (SELECT d.department_id, l.street_address, l.postal_code FROM departments d, locations l WHERE d.location_id = l.location_id) dept_locs_v WHERE dept_locs_v.department_id = e.department_id) outer_q WHERE outer_q.last_name = 'Smith'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, l.street_address, l.postal_code FROM employee e, departments d, locations l WHERE d.location_id = l.location_id AND d.department_id = e.department_id AND e.last_name = 'Smith'

guidance: 조인이 더 길어져도 불필요한 inline view는 유지하지 말고 base table join으로 펼친다.
필터와 조인 조건을 명시적으로 드러내 optimizer가 더 다양한 실행 경로를 조사할 수 있게 한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name, dept_locs_v.department_name, dept_locs_v.city, dept_locs_v.street_address, dept_locs_v.postal_code, j.job_title FROM employee e, jobs j, (SELECT d.department_id, d.department_name, l.city, l.street_address, l.postal_code FROM departments d, locations l WHERE d.location_id = l.location_id) dept_locs_v WHERE e.job_id = j.job_id AND dept_locs_v.department_id = e.department_id AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.last_name LIKE 'Sm%'
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name, d.department_name, l.city, l.street_address, l.postal_code, j.job_title FROM employee e, jobs j, departments d, locations l WHERE e.job_id = j.job_id AND d.location_id = l.location_id AND d.department_id = e.department_id AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND e.last_name LIKE 'Sm%'

guidance: IN-subquery는 block 단위로 unnest해서 parent block join predicate로 끌어올린다.
subquery가 단일 key projection이면 selected key와 parent filter를 join 형태로 재배치한다.
rules.example_bad_sql: SELECT sales.* FROM sales WHERE sales.cust_id IN (SELECT customers.cust_id FROM customers WHERE customers.active_yn = 'Y')
rules.example_tuned_sql: SELECT sales.* FROM sales, customers WHERE sales.cust_id = customers.cust_id AND customers.active_yn = 'Y'
